quote:
Saying goodbye to Merill Fernando is no easy thing. 🥲 

Merill is a lot of things... He is a technology wizard who is very hands on and able to turn ideas into reality in minutes and hours, not days (what most of you know him for, the ZT Assessment and Maester). He is a naturally curious mind who is always eager to try new things, Microsoft and non-Microsoft, and bring the best of what he sees out there (one of the main reasons Entra has an MCP today is a presentation he did to engineering to show what others were doing with MCP servers out there). He is great mentor who is easy to approach and will invest the time to get you started (he has helped skill many of us on AI and developer scenarios). But importantly, he is a wonderful human being, kind and humble and a true gem to know on a personal level. It has been a privilege to be your colleague over the past 6+ years, your manager over the past 2.5 and I am honored to call you a friend as well. Wish you the very best on your next endeavor, Microsoft is a better place because of the time you spent here, and you will always have a home here.

You really are shorter than you think you are, by the way. ❤️
